titleStmt.title: Valabhipur plates (PippalaruŠĻÖkharńę grant) of Dhruvasena I, year 21[6], MńĀgha ba. 3

licence.p: This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 Unported Licence. To view a copy of the licence, visit https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ or send a letter to Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.

msContents.summary: Grant of the village of PippalaruŠĻÖkharńę in favour of a Buddhist monastery in Valabhńę.

projectDesc.p: The project DHARMA has received funding from the European Research Council (ERC) under the European Union‚Äôs Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme (grant agreement no 809994).

prefixDef.p: Public URIs with the prefix bib to point to a Zotero Group Library named ERC-DHARMA whose data are open to the public.
Internal URIs using the part prefix to point to person elements in the DHARMA_IdListMembers_v01.xml file.

div.p:
svasti jayaskandhńĀvńĀrńĀT khuŠłćŠłćavedńęyagrńĀmavńĀsakńĀT prasabhapraŠĻáatńĀmitrńĀŠĻáńĀŠĻĀ maitrakńĀŠĻáńĀm atula
balasapatnamaŠĻáŠłćalńĀbhogasaŠĻĀsaktasaŠĻĀprahńĀraŇõatalabdhapratńĀpaŠł• pratńĀpopanatadńĀnamńĀnńĀ
rjjavopńĀrjjitńĀnurńĀgńĀnuraktamaulabhŠĻõtamitraŇõreŠĻáńębalńĀvńĀptarńĀjyaŇõrńęŠł• ŇõrńęsenńĀpatibhaŠĻ≠ńĀrkkaŠł•
tasya sutaŠł• taccaraŠĻáarajoruŠĻáanatapavitrńękŠĻõtaŇõirńĀŠł• ŇõirovanataŇõatrucŇęŠłćńĀmaŠĻái
prabhńĀvicchuritapńĀdanakhapaŠĻÖktidńędhitiŠł• dńęnńĀnńĀthajanopajńęvyamńĀnavibhavaŠł•
paramamńĀheŇõvaraŠł• senńĀpatidharasenaŠł• tasyńĀnujas tatpńĀdńĀbhipraŠĻáńĀmapraŇõasta
taravimalamaulimaŠĻáiŠł• manvńĀdipraŠĻáńętavidhividhńĀnadharmmńĀ dharmmarńĀja Iva vihi
tavinayavyavasthńĀpaddhatir akhilabhuvanamaŠĻáŠłćalńĀbhogaikasvńĀminńĀ paramasvńĀ
minńĀ svayam upahitarńĀjyńĀbhiŠĻ£ekamahńĀviŇõrńĀŠĻáanńĀvapŇętarńĀjaŇõrńęŠł• parama
mńĀheŇõvaraŠł• ŇõrńęmahńĀrńĀjadroŠĻáasiŠĻĀhaŠł• siŠĻĀha Iva tasyńĀnujas svabhujabalaparńĀ
kkrameŠĻáa paragajaghaŠĻ≠ńĀnńękńĀnńĀm ekavijayńę ŇõaraŠĻáaiŠĻ£iŠĻáńĀŠĻĀ ŇõaraŠĻáam avaboddhńĀ
ŇõńĀstrńĀrtthatattvńĀnńĀŠĻĀ kalpatarur iva suhŠĻõtpraŠĻáayinńĀŠĻĀ yathńĀbhilaŠĻ£itakńĀmaphalo
pabhogadaŠł• paramabhńĀgavataŠł• paramabhaŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ńĀrakapńĀdńĀnuddhyńĀto mahńĀsńĀmanta
mahńĀpratńęhńĀramahńĀdaŠĻáŠłćanńĀyakamahńĀkńĀrttńĀkŠĻõtikamahńĀrńĀjadhruvasenaŠļĖ kuŇõalńę
sarvvńĀn eva svńĀn ńĀyuktakamahattaradrńĀŠĻĀgikacńĀŠĻ≠abhaŠĻ≠ńĀdńęn samńĀj√ĪńĀ
payaty astu vas saŠĻĀviditaŠĻĀ yathńĀ mayńĀ mńĀtńĀpitroŠł• puŠĻáyńĀ
pyńĀyanńĀyńĀtmanaŇõ caihikńĀmuŠĻ£mikayathńĀbhilaŠĻ£itaphalńĀvńĀpti
nimittam ńĀcandrńĀrkkńĀrŠĻáŠĻáavakŠĻ£itisthitisamakńĀlńęnaŠł• vihńĀrasya patita
viŇõńęrŠĻáŠĻáapratisaŠĻĀskńĀraŠĻáńĀrtthaŠĻĀ dhŇępadńępatailapuŠĻ£popayogi ca sarvvńĀsma
stńĀprakŠĻ£epanńęyaŠł• sadityadńĀnakaraŠĻáaŠł• savńĀtabhŇętapratyńĀyaŠł• bhŇęmicchidranyńĀyena
valabhyńĀŠĻĀ svabhńĀgineyńęparamopńĀsikńĀduŠłćŠłćńĀkńĀritavihńĀra pratiŠĻ£ŠĻ≠hńĀpitńĀnńĀŠĻĀ
bhagavatńĀŠĻĀ saŠĻĀyaksaŠĻĀbuddhńĀnńĀŠĻĀ buddhńĀnńĀm ńĀryyabhikŠĻ£usaŠĻĀghasya ca piŠĻáŠłćapńĀtaglńĀnabheŠĻ£aja
cńęvarikńĀdyupayogńĀyńĀnumaŠĻĀjyaparńĀnte pippalaruŠĻÖkharńęgrńĀmo dattaŠł• yataŠł•
tatrńĀdhikŠĻõtńĀnńĀŠĻĀ yat tatrotpadyate tad udgrńĀhayatńĀŠĻĀ na kenacit pratiŠĻ£edho
vicńĀraŠĻáńĀ vńĀ kńĀryyńĀsmadvaŠĻĀŇõajair apy anityaŠĻĀ mńĀnuŠĻ£yam asthirńĀŠĻáy aiŇõvaryyńĀŠĻáy ape
kŠĻ£ńĀyam asmaddńĀyo numantavyaŠł• yaŇõ cńĀcchindyńĀd ńĀcchidyamńĀnaŠĻĀ vńĀnumodeta sa paŠĻĀca
bhiŠł• mahńĀpńĀtakaiŠł• sopapńĀtakaiŇõ ca saŠĻĀyuktaŠł• syńĀd atra ca vyńĀsoktaŠł• Ňõloko bhavati . svadattńĀŠĻĀ
paradattńĀŠĻĀ vńĀ yo hareta vasundharńĀŠĻĀ gavńĀŠĻĀ Ňõatasahasrasya hantuŠł• prńĀpnoti kilbiŠĻ£aŠĻĀ
svahasto mama mahńĀsńĀmantamahńĀpratńęhńĀramahńĀdaŠĻáŠłćanńĀyakamahńĀkńĀrttńĀkŠĻõtika
mahńĀrńĀjaŇõrńędhruvasenasya bhogikavaikundhaŠł• likhitaŠĻĀ kikkakena . saŠĻĀ 200 10 6 mńĀgha ba di
